headline: CenterPoint Energy : Approximately 97.5% of CenterPoint Energy customers experienced no impacts during overnight thunderstorms as crews responded safely and quickly to address localized impacts to system
summary: 2026-05-11T05:00:00Z Since 1 a.m., CenterPoint frontline workers and contractors have restored approximately 60,000 customers ...
